series_metadata.series_title: OIS Polices Standards Procedure and Standard Operating Procedures
series_metadata.series_description: All IPPs are maintained by EBS. OIS also has Policies, Standards & Procedures (PSPs), Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs), job aids and other related documents. Copies of PSPs and SOPs are stored in ServiceNow, which is maintained by DAS-OIT.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: in Office OIS OIS Polices Standards Procedure and Standard Operating Procedures , and OIS will inform DAS-OIT of retention period any versions that are stored in ServiceNow, which is maintained by DAS-OIT
